title: Integrate with Indeed and Simply Hired
excerpt: It would be great to have an integration with Indeed Employer and Simply Hired so that when a candidate applies, it goes directly to the recruitment pipeline (or whatever board people are using).

posts.author: bldb (Jacqueline Angelo)
